Appendix

附录

A. Prompts

A. 提示词

In this section, we provide the full prompt templates used throughout the different phases of our framework. These templates are designed to ensure consistent agent behavior and structured data generation across various environments. 在本节中，我们提供了框架各阶段所使用的完整提示词模板。这些模板旨在确保智能体在不同环境下的行为一致性及结构化数据生成。

A.1. Agent Execution Prompts

A.1. 智能体执行提示词

The following prompts are used during the online inference phase. These templates provide the agent with the current task description, a history of previous interactions, and a set of retrieved skills (experiences) to guide its decision-making process. The prompts explicitly enforce a Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning step before action selection. 以下提示词用于在线推理阶段。这些模板为智能体提供了当前任务描述、过往交互历史以及一组检索到的技能（经验），以指导其决策过程。提示词明确要求在选择动作前进行思维链（CoT）推理。

Prompt A.1: ALFWorld Agent Execution with Skills 提示词 A.1：带技能的 ALFWorld 智能体执行

System Prompt: 系统提示词：

You are an expert agent operating in the ALFRED Embodied Environment. Your task is to: {task_description} 你是一位在 ALFRED 具身环境中运行的专家智能体。你的任务是：{task_description}

##Retrieved Relevant Experience

##检索到的相关经验

{retrieved_memories} {retrieved_memories}

##Current Progress ##当前进度

Prior to this step, you have already taken {step_count} step(s). Below are the most recent {history_length} observations and the corresponding actions you took: {action_history} 在此步骤之前，你已经执行了 {step_count} 步。以下是最近 {history_length} 次观察结果及你采取的相应动作：{action_history}

You are now at step {current_step} and your current observation is: {current_observation} 你现在处于第 {current_step} 步，当前的观察结果是：{current_observation}

Your admissible actions of the current situation are: [{admissible_actions}]. 当前情境下你可采取的动作为：[{admissible_actions}]。

Now it's your turn to take an action. You should first reason step-by-step about the current situation. This reasoning process MUST be enclosed within tags. Once you've finished your reasoning, you should choose an admissible action for current step and present it within tags. 现在轮到你采取行动了。你应首先针对当前情境进行逐步推理。此推理过程必须包含在 标签内。推理完成后，你应为当前步骤选择一个可行的动作，并将其置于 标签内。

Prompt A.2: WebShop Agent Execution with Skills 提示词 A.2：带技能的 WebShop 智能体执行

System Prompt: 系统提示词：

You are an expert autonomous agent operating in the WebShop e-commerce environment. Your task is to: {task_description}. 你是一位在 WebShop 电子商务环境中运行的专家自主智能体。你的任务是：{task_description}。

##Retrieved Relevant Experience ##检索到的相关经验

{retrieved_memories} {retrieved_memories}

##Current Progress ##当前进度

Prior to this step, you have already taken {step_count} step(s). Below are the most recent {history_length} observations and the corresponding actions you took: {action_history} 在此步骤之前，您已经执行了 {step_count} 步。以下是最近 {history_length} 次观察结果及您采取的相应行动：{action_history}

You are now at step {current_step} and your current observation is: {current_observation} 您现在处于第 {current_step} 步，当前的观察结果为：{current_observation}

Your admissible actions of the current situation are: [ {available_actions} ]. 当前情境下您可采取的行动为：[ {available_actions} ]。

Now it's your turn to take one action for the current step. You should first reason step-by-step about the current situation, then think carefully which admissible action best advances the shopping goal. This reasoning process MUST be enclosed within tags. Once you've finished your reasoning, you should choose an admissible action for current step and present it within tags. 现在轮到您为当前步骤采取行动。您应首先针对当前情境进行逐步推理，然后仔细思考哪种可采取的行动最能推进购物目标。此推理过程必须包含在 标签内。推理完成后，您应为当前步骤选择一个可采取的行动，并将其置于 标签内。

A.2. Skill Generation and Distillation Prompts

A.2. 技能生成与蒸馏提示词

These prompts are utilized during the skill discovery and library initialization phases. They guide a high-capability teacher model to analyze interaction trajectories, identify failure modes, and distill reusable, actionable skills into a structured JSON format. 这些提示词用于技能发现和库初始化阶段。它们引导高能力教师模型分析交互轨迹、识别失败模式，并将可重用、可操作的技能提炼为结构化的 JSON 格式。

SKILLRL: Evolving Agents via Recursive Skill-Augmented Reinforcement Learning SKILLRL：通过递归技能增强强化学习进化智能体

Prompt B.1: Dynamic Skill Discovery from Failures 提示词 B.1：从失败中动态发现技能

 

    Analyze these failed {env_description} agent trajectories and suggest NEW skills to add.     分析这些失败的 {env_description} 智能体轨迹，并建议添加新的技能。

FAILED TRAJECTORIES: {failure_examples} 失败轨迹：{failure_examples}

    EXISTING SKILL TITLES: {existing_titles}     现有技能标题：{existing_titles}

    Generate 1-3 NEW actionable skills that would help avoid these failures. Each skill must have: skill-id, title (3-5 words),     生成 1-3 个有助于避免这些失败的新型可操作技能。每项技能必须包含：skill-id、标题（3-5 个词）、

principle (1-2 sentences), when_to_apply. The skill_id should be unique and follow the pattern: "dyn_001", "dyn_002", 原则（1-2 句话）、when_to_apply（适用场景）。skill_id 应唯一并遵循以下格式："dyn_001", "dyn_002",

    etc.     等。

    Return ONLY a JSON array of skills, no other text.     仅返回一个技能 JSON 数组，不要包含其他文本。

 

Prompt B.2: Initial Skill Distillation (ALFWorld) 提示词 B.2：初始技能蒸馏（ALFWorld）

 

You are an expert at distilling agent behavior patterns into concise, actionable skills. Analyze these successful and failed trajectories 你是一位擅长将智能体行为模式提炼为简洁、可操作技能的专家。请分析这些成功与失败的轨迹

        from an embodied AI agent operating in household environments (ALFWorld).         来自在家庭环境中运行的具身智能体（ALFWorld）。

    SUCCESSFUL TRAJECTORIES: {success_patterns}     成功轨迹：{success_patterns}

    FAILED TRAJECTORIES: {failure_patterns}     失败轨迹：{failure_patterns}

Generate 8-12 GENERAL SKILLS that apply across ALL task types. These should be: 1. Concise; 2. Actionable; 3. Transferable; 生成 8-12 个适用于所有任务类型的通用技能。要求：1. 简洁；2. 可操作；3. 可迁移；

    4. Failure-aware. Focus on: Navigation, object manipulation, state tracking, error recovery, and container interaction rules.     4. 具备纠错意识。重点关注：导航、物体操作、状态追踪、错误恢复以及容器交互规则。

    Return ONLY the JSON array, no other text.     仅返回 JSON 数组，无需其他文本。

 

Prompt B.3: Initial Skill Distillation (WebShop) 提示词 B.3：初始技能蒸馏（WebShop）

 

You are an expert at distilling agent behavior patterns into concise, actionable skills. Analyze these successful and failed trajectories 你是一位擅长将智能体行为模式提炼为简洁、可操作技能的专家。请分析这些成功与失败的轨迹

    from an AI agent operating in an online shopping environment (WebShop).     来自在在线购物环境中运行的 AI 智能体（WebShop）。

    SUCCESSFUL TRAJECTORIES: {success_patterns}     成功轨迹：{success_patterns}

    FAILED TRAJECTORIES: {failure_patterns}     失败轨迹：{failure_patterns}

    Generate 10-15 GENERAL SKILLS. Focus on: Search query formulation, product selection heuristics, option configuration (size,     生成 10-15 个通用技能。重点关注：搜索查询构建、产品选择启发式方法、选项配置（尺寸、

    color, etc.), constraint verification, navigation patterns, and price handling.     颜色等）、约束验证、导航模式以及价格处理。

Return ONLY the JSON array, no other text.     仅返回 JSON 数组，无需其他文本。

 

A.3. Cold-start Trajectory Generation Prompts

A.3. 冷启动轨迹生成提示词

To bridge the gap between a base model and the target performance, we use the following prompts to generate high-quality synthetic trajectories for Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). These prompts instruct the teacher model to solve tasks while explicitly demonstrating the application of specific skills, thereby providing a clear learning signal for the student model. 为弥合基础模型与目标性能之间的差距，我们使用以下提示词生成高质量的合成轨迹，用于监督微调（SFT）。这些提示词指导教师模型在解决任务的同时，明确演示特定技能的应用，从而为学生模型提供清晰的学习信号。

Prompt C.1: Synthetic Trajectory Generation (ALFWorld) 提示词 C.1：合成轨迹生成（ALFWorld）

 

You are an expert agent in the ALFRED embodied environment. You will be given a task and relevant skills to apply. Your goal is to 你是一位 ALFRED 具身环境中的专家智能体。你将获得一项任务及需要应用的关联技能。你的目标是

generate a successful trajectory that demonstrates proper use of these skills. 生成一条能够展示这些技能正确用法的成功轨迹。

You should generate a step-by-step trajectory that: 你应该生成一条分步轨迹，要求：

    1. Uses the provided skills appropriately;     1. 恰当地使用所提供的技能；

    2. Takes realistic actions in the environment;     2. 在环境中采取符合实际的行动；

    3. Completes the task successfully;     3. 成功完成任务；

  1. Demonstrates good planning and systematic exploration.

  2. 展示良好的规划与系统性探索。

    For each step, you should:     对于每一步，你应该：

    - Think through the current situation using tags.     - 使用 标签思考当前情境。

        - Choose an appropriate action using tags.         - 使用 标签选择合适的行动。

    - The action should be a simple command like "go to cabinet 1", "open drawer 2", "take apple 1", "put apple 1 in/on countertop 1".     - 行动应为简单的指令，例如“go to cabinet 1”、“open drawer 2”、“take apple 1”、“put apple 1 in/on countertop 1”。

Generate a complete trajectory from start to finish. Stop when the task is complete. 生成一条从始至终的完整轨迹。任务完成后停止。

 

Prompt C.2: Synthetic Trajectory Generation (WebShop) 提示词 C.2：合成轨迹生成（WebShop）

You are an expert shopping agent in the WebShop e-commerce environment. You will be given a shopping task and relevant skills to apply. Your goal is to generate a successful trajectory that demonstrates proper use of these skills. 你是一位 WebShop 电子商务环境中的专家级购物智能体。你将获得一项购物任务及可应用的技能。你的目标是生成一条展示如何正确使用这些技能的成功轨迹。

You should generate a step-by-step trajectory that: 你应该生成一条分步轨迹，要求：

  1. Uses the provided skills appropriately;

  2. 恰当地使用所提供的技能；

  1. Takes realistic actions in the WebShop environment;

  2. 在 WebShop 环境中采取符合实际的操作；

  1. Successfully finds and purchases the requested product;

  2. 成功找到并购买所要求的商品；

  1. Demonstrates good search strategies and product evaluation.

  2. 展示良好的搜索策略与商品评估能力。

For each step, you should: 对于每一步，你应该：

  • Think through the current situation using tags.

  • 使用 标签思考当前情况。

  • Choose an appropriate action using tags.

  • 使用 标签选择适当的操作。

  • Actions can be: search [query], click [element], or buy now.

  • 操作可以是：search [查询词]、click [元素] 或 buy now（立即购买）。

Generate a complete trajectory from start to finish. Stop when the purchase is complete. 生成一条从始至终的完整轨迹。在完成购买后停止。

B. Additional Experimental Details

B. 补充实验细节

B.1. Hyperparameters

B.1. 超参数

Table 4. Hyperparameters for SKILLRL. 表 4. SKILLRL 的超参数。

HyperparameterValue
Cold-Start SFT
Learning rate$1 \times {10}^{-4}$
Batch size16
Epochs3
SFT examples7,500 (AlfWorld) / 2,400 (WebShop)
RL Training
Learning rate$1 \times {10}^{-6}$
Batch size64
KL loss Coef0.01
Invalid Action Penalty Coef0.1
Max Prompt Length6,000
Max Response Length1,024
Epoch150
Skill Retrieval
Top-K retrieval6
Validation interval5 Steps
Update Threshold $\delta$0.4
Max failures analyzed10 (SR < 0.4) / 5 (SR > 0.4)
Max new skills per evolution3
超参数数值
冷启动 SFT
学习率$1 \times {10}^{-4}$
批大小16
训练轮数3
SFT 样本数7,500 (AlfWorld) / 2,400 (WebShop)
RL 训练
学习率$1 \times {10}^{-6}$
批大小64
KL 损失系数0.01
无效动作惩罚系数0.1
最大提示词长度6,000
最大回复长度1,024
训练轮数150
技能检索
Top-K 检索6
验证间隔5 步
更新阈值 $\delta$0.4
最大分析失败次数10 (SR < 0.4) / 5 (SR > 0.4)
每次演化新增技能上限3

B.2. Compute Resources

B.2. 计算资源

All experiments were conducted on a cluster with 8 NVIDIA H100 80GB GPUs. Training times: 所有实验均在配备 8 张 NVIDIA H100 80GB GPU 的集群上进行。训练耗时如下：

  • Trajectory collection: 3 hours

  • 轨迹收集：3 小时

  • Skill distillation: 0.5 hours

  • 技能蒸馏：0.5 小时

  • Cold-start SFT: 2 hour

  • 冷启动 SFT：2 小时

  • RL training: 24 hours

  • RL 训练：24 小时

Table 5. Example distilled skills from SKILLBANK for ALFWorld (Shridhar et al.). This table summarizes general patterns and application logic derived from raw trajectories. 表 5. SKILLBANK 中用于 ALFWorld (Shridhar et al.) 的蒸馏技能示例。本表总结了从原始轨迹中提取的通用模式与应用逻辑。

IDSkill TitlePrinciple (Actionable Pattern)When to Apply
General al Exploration & Acquisition Skills
gen_001Systematic ExplorationSearch every plausible surface or container exactly once before revisiting; prioritize unseen locations.Anytime the goal count is not met and unexplored areas remain.
gen_002Immediate AcquisitionAs soon as a required object becomes visible and reachable, take it immediately.Upon first visual confirmation of a goal-relevant object.
gen_003Destination First PolicyAfter picking up a goal object, navigate directly to the known target receptacle and place it.Holding any goal object while target location is identified.
State-Changing & Spatial Relation Skills
gen_005Use State-Changing Tools EarlyAcquire the object, then immediately use the nearest suitable appliance (heat/cool/clean) before placement.After picking up an object requiring temperature or cleanliness change.
gen_006Establish Spatial RelationsFirst locate the reference object, adjust its state if needed, then search or place in the specified region.Tasks containing prepositions like "under", "inside", or "on".
Reliability & Error Recovery
gen_014Loop Escape TriggerIf the last 3-5 actions do not change the state, switch to an untried search branch or action type.After several consecutive no-progress observations.
gen_015Pre-Action Sanity CheckConfirm prerequisites (hand free, capacity, power) before executing manipulative commands.Right before issuing any command that could legally fail.
ID技能名称原则（可执行模式）应用时机
通用探索与获取技能
gen_001系统性探索在重新访问前，对每个可能的表面或容器精确搜索一次；优先搜索未见区域。目标数量未达成且仍有未探索区域时。
gen_002即时获取一旦目标物体可见且可触及，立即将其拾取。首次视觉确认目标相关物体时。
gen_003目的地优先策略拾取目标物体后，直接导航至已知目标容器并放置。持有目标物体且目标位置已确定时。
状态改变与空间关系技能
gen_005优先使用状态改变工具获取物体后，在放置前立即使用最近的合适设备（加热/冷却/清洁）。拾取需要改变温度或清洁度的物体后。
gen_006建立空间关系先定位参考物体，必要时调整其状态，然后在指定区域搜索或放置。包含“在……下”、“在……内”或“在……上”等介词的任务。
可靠性与错误恢复
gen_014循环跳出触发器若最近3-5个动作未改变状态，则切换至未尝试的搜索分支或动作类型。连续多次观察无进展后。
gen_015动作前完整性检查执行操作指令前，确认先决条件（手部空闲、容量、电源）。在发出任何可能导致失败的指令前。

Table 6. Common Agent Failures and Mitigation Strategies for ALFWorld. 表6. ALFWorld中常见的智能体故障及缓解策略。

IDFailure DescriptionRoot Cause (Why it happens)Mitigation (How to avoid)
err_001Redundant RevisitLacks explicit memory of explored areas; strategy degenerates into local loops.Maintain an exploration map; prioritize unvisited candidates.
err_006Skipping State ChangesConflates object presence with goal satisfaction; omits cleanliness/temp checks.Integrate state precondition checks into the planner before placement.
ID故障描述根本原因（发生原因）缓解措施（如何避免）
err_001冗余重访缺乏对已探索区域的显式记忆；策略退化为局部循环。维护探索地图；优先选择未访问的候选区域。
err_006跳过状态变更将物体存在与目标达成混淆；忽略了清洁度/临时性检查。在放置前将状态前提检查集成到规划器中。

Total wall-clock time: approximately 30 hours per experiment. 总挂钟时间：每个实验约 30 小时。

C. Illustration of Skill Library

C. 技能库示例

In this section, we provide some example catalog of distilled skills and error taxonomies for both the ALFWorld and WebShop environments. Tables 5 and 7 detail the general skills distilled for embodied manipulation and web-based shopping, respectively, highlighting the actionable principles required for systematic exploration and constraint satisfaction. Furthermore, we provide a structured analysis of failure cases in Table 6 and Table 8, which categorizes common mistakes, ranging from spatial reasoning loops in ALFWorld to price-shift oversights in WebShop, alongside their root causes and proposed mitigation strategies. 在本节中，我们为 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 环境提供了一些精炼技能目录和错误分类示例。表 5 和表 7 分别详细列出了针对具身操作和网络购物所精炼的通用技能，突出了系统性探索和约束满足所需的行动准则。此外，我们在表 6 和表 8 中提供了故障案例的结构化分析，对常见错误进行了分类，涵盖了从 ALFWorld 中的空间推理循环到 WebShop 中的价格变动疏忽，并列出了其根本原因及相应的缓解策略。

Table 7. Example distilled skills for WebShop Navigation (Yao et al., 2022a). These skills represent the strategic patterns used by the agent to handle large-scale product search and constraint satisfaction. 表 7. WebShop 导航的精炼技能示例（Yao et al., 2022a）。这些技能代表了智能体用于处理大规模产品搜索和约束满足的策略模式。

IDSkill TitlePrinciple (Actionable Pattern)When to Apply
& Query Engineering
gen_001Prioritize Core KeywordsInclude product type, 1-2 functional attributes, and hard constraints; omit secondary descriptors.Before issuing the first search or refining over-specific queries.
gen_002Iterative RefinementAdjust keywords or apply site filters instead of repeating the same failed query.When results are irrelevant or repeat despite multiple searches.
Product Evaluation & Verification
gen_003Scan Before You ClickRead titles, thumbnails, and prices in results to ensure plausibility before opening a link.On search results pages when choosing the next product to inspect.
gen_004Verify Early, Abort FastImmediately check category, attributes, and price on the product page; leave if any constraint is violated.Within the first observation on every product detail page.
gen_006Confirm Hidden AttributesOpen Description/Features sections to ensure nonvisible specs (e.g., material) meet constraints.When constraints are not evident from the title or variant list.
Configuration & Transaction
gen_005Set Mandatory VariantsAlways select required options (size, color, etc.) before evaluating price or purchasing.After confirming product match but before any purchase action.
gen_007Check Variant PricingFor price ranges, select the exact variant combination to verify the specific price is within budget.Whenever price changes with variant selection or shows as a range.
gen_013Purchase DecisivelyExecute 'Buy Now' immediately once all constraints and prices are confirmed on a variant.After validating every constraint on the current product variant.
ID技能名称原则（可执行模式）适用场景
& 查询工程
gen_001优先核心关键词包含产品类型、1-2个功能属性及硬性约束；省略次要描述。在首次搜索或优化过于具体的查询之前。
gen_002迭代优化调整关键词或应用站点筛选器，而非重复执行失败的查询。当搜索结果不相关或多次搜索后仍重复时。
产品评估与验证
gen_003点击前先扫描阅读结果中的标题、缩略图和价格，确保合理后再打开链接。在搜索结果页面选择下一个要查看的产品时。
gen_004尽早验证，快速放弃立即检查产品页面的类别、属性和价格；若违反任何约束则离开。在每个产品详情页的首次观察中。
gen_006确认隐藏属性打开描述/功能部分，确保不可见规格（如材质）符合约束。当约束无法从标题或变体列表中明确看出时。
配置与交易
gen_005设置必选变体在评估价格或购买前，务必选择所需选项（尺寸、颜色等）。在确认产品匹配后，执行购买操作前。
gen_007检查变体价格对于价格区间，选择确切的变体组合以核实具体价格是否在预算内。当价格随变体选择而变化或显示为区间时。
gen_013果断购买一旦确认变体的所有约束和价格，立即执行“立即购买”。在验证当前产品变体的所有约束后。

Table 8. Common Failures in Web-based Shopping Tasks. 表 8. 基于 Web 的购物任务中的常见失败案例。

IDFailure DescriptionRoot CauseMitigation Strategy
err_001Missing Constraints in QueryOmits size or price caps, leading to overwhelming or irrelevant result sets.Assemble full requirement list first; ensure every hard constraint is in the query string.
err_004Price Shift OversightFails to notice price changes after selecting a specific size or color variant.Re-read the price element after every option change before proceeding to checkout.
err_005Premature PurchaseClicks "Buy Now" without setting mandatory variants, leading to errors or wrong items.Validate that every required dropdown/radio option is explicitly selected before buying.
err_009Ignoring Stock StatusAttempts to purchase out-of-stock items by ignoring disabled buttons or stock labels.Verify that the 'Add to Cart' button is enabled and no 'Out of Stock' message is present post-selection.
err_011Sponsored Link DistractionClicks loosely matched ads, diverting the workflow from organic, suitable products.Implement ad-label detection; prioritize organic listings for higher constraint reliability.
ID失败描述根本原因缓解策略
err_001查询中缺少约束忽略了尺寸或价格上限，导致结果过多或不相关。先汇总完整需求列表；确保每个硬性约束都包含在查询字符串中。
err_004价格变动疏忽在选择特定尺寸或颜色变体后，未能注意到价格变化。在每次更改选项后、进入结账前，重新读取价格元素。
err_005过早购买未设置必要变体即点击“立即购买”，导致错误或选错商品。购买前确认所有必选下拉菜单/单选框均已明确选择。
err_009忽视库存状态无视禁用按钮或库存标签，尝试购买缺货商品。确认“加入购物车”按钮已启用，且选择后未出现“缺货”提示。
err_011赞助链接干扰点击匹配度不高的广告，导致工作流偏离原生、合适的商品。实现广告标签检测；优先选择原生列表以提高约束可靠性。

D. Additional Cases

D. 补充案例

Case 1: WebShop Footwear (Functional Constraints) 案例 1：WebShop 鞋类（功能性约束）

Task: I want a pair of men's black slip-resistant work shoes, size 10, rubber sole, price lower than $50.00. 任务：我想要一双男士黑色防滑工作鞋，10 码，橡胶底，价格低于 50.00 美元。

Skills [foo_002] Verify features in description; [foo_004] Confirm price after variant selection. 技能 [foo_002] 核实描述中的特征；[foo_004] 在选择变体后确认价格。

Avoid [err_001] Omitting price cap; [err_003] Selecting wrong product category. 避免 [err_001] 忽略价格上限；[err_003] 选择错误的产品类别。

Agent Trajectory with Skill-Guided Reasoning 基于技能引导推理的智能体轨迹

Step 1Obs: WebShop homepage.
Think: Per [gen_001], I'll include key constraints (type, function, color, price) in the query.
Action: search[men black slip resistant work shoes rubber sole under
Step 2Obs: Results: [1] Chef Shoes \$38.99; [2] Kitchen Shoes \$42.50; [3] Steel Toe Boots \$55.99.
Think: [gen_003] Item [1] is under budget and matches function. Item [3] is over budget (skip).
Action: click [Item 1]
Step 3Obs: Product page. Price: \$35.99-\$45.99. Colors: Black, White. Sizes: 7-12.
Think: [foo_002] Description confirms rubber sole. Now selecting Black and Size 10 [foo_003].
Action: click [Black] → click [10]
Step 5Obs: Selected: Black, Size 10. Price updated to \$38.99.
Think: [foo_004] \$38.99 ; \$50. All constraints (color, size, function, price) are satisfied.
Action: click [Buy Now]
第1步观察：WebShop主页。
思考：根据[gen_001]，我将在查询中包含关键约束（类型、功能、颜色、价格）。
行动：search[男士黑色防滑工作鞋橡胶底低于
第2步观察：结果：[1]厨师鞋\$38.99；[2]厨房鞋\$42.50；[3]钢头靴\$55.99。
思考：[gen_003]项目[1]在预算内且符合功能要求。项目[3]超出预算（跳过）。
行动：click [Item 1]
第3步观察：产品页面。价格：\$35.99-\$45.99。颜色：黑色、白色。尺码：7-12。
思考：[foo_002]描述确认了橡胶底。现在选择黑色和10码[foo_003]。
行动：click [Black] → click [10]
第5步观察：已选择：黑色，10码。价格更新为\$38.99。
思考：[foo_004]\$38.99；\$50。所有约束（颜色、尺码、功能、价格）均已满足。
行动：click [Buy Now]

Result: SUCCESS - Purchased at $38.99. Key Skills: [foo_002] (Verification), [foo_004] (Price Check). 结果：成功 - 以 $38.99 购入。关键技能：[foo_002]（验证），[foo_004]（价格检查）。

Case 2: Electronics (Speaker with Abort-and-Retry) 案例 2：电子产品（带中止并重试功能的音箱）

Task: I need a portable bluetooth speaker, waterproof, black color, price lower than $30.00. 任务：我需要一个便携式蓝牙音箱，防水，黑色，价格低于 $30.00。

Skills [ele_001] Constraint-rich search; [ele_004] Bail on mismatch fast; [gen_002] Iterative refinement. 技能：[ele_001] 约束丰富的搜索；[ele_004] 快速放弃不匹配项；[gen_002] 迭代优化。

Avoid [err_002] Overly specific variant names in search; [ele_006] Avoid click loops. 避免：[err_002] 搜索中过于具体的变体名称；[ele_006] 避免点击循环。

Agent Trajectory: Handling Missing Constraints 智能体轨迹：处理缺失约束

Step 1 Obs: WebShop homepage. 第 1 步观察：WebShop 主页。

Think: [ele_001] Packing all mandatory attributes: portable, bluetooth, waterproof, black, ; $30. 思考：[ele_001] 整合所有强制属性：便携、蓝牙、防水、黑色；$30。

Action: search[portable bluetooth speaker waterproof black under 30] 动作：search[portable bluetooth speaker waterproof black under 30]

Step 2 Obs: Results: [1] Waterproof Speaker $28.99; [2] Mini LED Speaker $19.99; [3] 20W Speaker $35.50. 第 2 步观察：结果：[1] 防水音箱 $28.99；[2] 迷你 LED 音箱 $19.99；[3] 20W 音箱 $35.50。

Think: [ele_005] Item [1] matches most keywords and price. 思考：[ele_005] 项目 [1] 最符合关键词和价格。

Action: click [Item 1] 动作：click [Item 1]

Step 3 Obs: Product page (Item 1). Colors: Blue, Red, Green, Army Green. Black unavailable. 第 3 步观察：产品页面（项目 1）。颜色：蓝色、红色、绿色、军绿色。无黑色选项。

Think: [gen_004] Verify Early, Abort Fast: No black option! [ele_004] Bail immediately to find another 思考：[gen_004] 尽早验证，快速中止：没有黑色选项！[ele_004] 立即放弃以寻找其他

candidate. 候选产品。

Action: click [Back to Search] 动作：click [Back to Search]

Step 4 Obs: Back on search results. 步骤 4 观察：回到搜索结果。

Think: [gen_002] Iterative refinement. Item [2] $19.99 is the next best candidate. 思考：[gen_002] 迭代优化。项目 [2] 19.99 美元是下一个最佳候选。

Action: click [Item 2] 动作：点击 [项目 2]

Step 5 Obs: Product page (Item 2). Colors: Black, Blue, Red. Specs: IPX5 Waterproof. 步骤 5 观察：产品页面（项目 2）。颜色：黑色、蓝色、红色。规格：IPX5 防水。

Think: [ele_002] Black is available! IPX5 confirms waterproof. Selecting Black. 思考：[ele_002] 有黑色可选！IPX5 确认防水。选择黑色。

Action: click [Black] 动作：点击 [黑色]

Step 6 Obs: Black selected. Final price: $19.99. 步骤 6 观察：已选黑色。最终价格：19.99 美元。

Think: [ele_003] $19.99 ; $30. All specs (black, portable, waterproof) verified. 思考：[ele_003] 19.99 美元；30 美元。所有规格（黑色、便携、防水）均已核实。

Action: click [Buy Now] 动作：点击 [立即购买]

Result: SUCCESS - Efficiently handled attribute mismatch via early exit. Key Skills Applied: [gen_004] (Abort Fast), [ele_004] (Bail on Mismatch). 结果：成功 - 通过提前退出高效处理了属性不匹配。应用的关键技能：[gen_004]（快速中止），[ele_004]（不匹配即退出）。

Case 1: ALFWorld Clean Task (Lettuce $\rightarrow$ Sink $\rightarrow$ Countertop)
Task: Clean some lettuce and put it in countertop.
Mistakes Avoided Core Skills [cle_001] Phase-ordered plan (Locate $\rightarrow$ Clean $\rightarrow$ Place); [cle_006] Use location priors (Fridge for food). [err_002] Skipping closed containers; [err_003] Ignoring visible target objects.
Step 1-3 Obs: Fridge 1 is closed. Action: open fridge 1 → take lettuce 1
Reasoning: Per [cle_006], food is likely in the fridge. [gen_002] Grab lettuce immediately on sight.
Step 4-6 Obs: Arrive at sinkbasin 1. Action: clean lettuce 1 with sinkbasin 1
Reasoning: Per [cle_001] Phase 2: bring to water source. [cle_003] Go straight to sink.
Step 7 Obs: Arrive at countertop 1. Action: put lettuce 1 in/on countertop 1
Reasoning: Per [gen_003] Destination First: place cleaned object immediately to finish.
Result: SUCCESS (7 Steps) — Skills used: [gen_010] (Decomposition), [cle_003] (Sink First).
案例 1：ALFWorld 清洁任务（生菜 $\rightarrow$ 水槽 $\rightarrow$ 台面）
任务：清洁生菜并将其放置在台面上。
规避错误 核心技能 [cle_001] 阶段性规划（定位 $\rightarrow$ 清洁 $\rightarrow$ 放置）；[cle_006] 利用位置先验（食物在冰箱中）。[err_002] 跳过关闭的容器；[err_003] 忽略可见的目标物体。
第 1-3 步 观察：冰箱 1 已关闭。动作：打开冰箱 1 → 拿取生菜 1
推理：根据 [cle_006]，食物通常在冰箱里。[gen_002] 看到生菜立即抓取。
第 4-6 步 观察：到达水槽 1。动作：用水槽 1 清洁生菜 1
推理：根据 [cle_001] 阶段 2：带到水源处。[cle_003] 直接前往水槽。
第 7 步 观察：到达台面 1。动作：将生菜 1 放置在台面 1 上
推理：根据 [gen_003] 目的地优先：立即放置清洁后的物体以完成任务。
结果：成功（7 步）— 使用技能：[gen_010]（分解），[cle_003]（水槽优先）。

Case 2: ALFWorld Heat Task (Egg → Microwave → Countertop) 案例 2：ALFWorld 加热任务（鸡蛋 → 微波炉 → 台面）

Task: Heat some egg and put it in countertop. 任务：加热鸡蛋并将其放在台面上。

[hea_001] Secure exact target first; [hea_003] Open-Place-Heat sequence; [hea_004] No appliance before object.
Step 1-3Obs: Countertop 1 (no egg) $\rightarrow$ Countertop 2 (egg found). Action: take egg 1
Reasoning: [hea_004] Avoid microwave until object is held. [hea_002] Systematic search of surfaces.
Step 4-6Obs: Microwave 1 is closed. Action: open microwave $1 \rightarrow$ heat egg 1
Reasoning: [hea_003] Correct sequence: open door first, then initiate state change.
Step 7-8Obs: Egg is heated. Action: go to countertop 1 → put egg 1
Reasoning: [hea_005] Direct Post-Heat Placement: move to target without detours.
Result: SUCCESS (8 Steps) — Skills used: [hea_001] (Target First, [hea_004] (Sequence Control).
[hea_001] 优先锁定目标；[hea_003] 打开-放置-加热序列；[hea_004] 拿取物体前不使用电器。
第 1-3 步观察：台面 1（无鸡蛋）$\rightarrow$ 台面 2（发现鸡蛋）。动作：拿取鸡蛋 1
推理：[hea_004] 在拿到物体前避开微波炉。[hea_002] 对表面进行系统性搜索。
第 4-6 步观察：微波炉 1 已关闭。动作：打开微波炉 $1 \rightarrow$ 加热鸡蛋 1
推理：[hea_003] 正确序列：先开门，再启动状态变更。
第 7-8 步观察：鸡蛋已加热。动作：前往台面 1 → 放置鸡蛋 1
推理：[hea_005] 加热后直接放置：无绕路直接移至目标点。
结果：成功（8 步）— 使用技能：[hea_001]（优先目标），[hea_004]（序列控制）。

Case 3: ALFWorld Examine Task (Pencil ⊕ Desklamp → Success) 案例 3：ALFWorld 检查任务（铅笔 ⊕ 台灯 → 成功）

Task: Look at pencil under the desklamp. 任务：查看台灯下的铅笔。

Core Skills
Mistakes Avoided		[loo_001] Seek lamp surfaces (Desk/Sidetable); [loo_002] Switch lamp on; [exa_001] Pair objects early (Target & Tool co-location).
[err_003] Ignoring reachable targets; [loo_005] Preventing action loops (Toggle only once).
核心技能
避免的错误		[loo_001] 寻找灯具表面（书桌/边桌）；[loo_002] 打开灯；[exa_001] 尽早配对物体（目标与工具同位）。
[err_003] 忽略可触及目标；[loo_005] 防止动作循环（仅切换一次）。

Agent Trajectory: High-Efficiency Co-location Handling 智能体轨迹：高效共位处理

Step 1 Obs: Mid-room. Visible: desk 1/2, drawer 1-3, sidetable 1, etc. 步骤 1 观测：房间中部。可见：书桌 1/2，抽屉 1-3，边桌 1 等。

Reasoning: [loo_001] Desklamps usually sit on desks. Prioritizing desk 1 to find both pencil and lamp in one 推理：[loo_001] 台灯通常放置在书桌上。优先前往书桌 1 以同时找到铅笔和台灯。

go.

 

Action: go to desk 1 动作：前往书桌 1

Step 2 Obs: On desk 1: alarmclock 1, desklamp 1, pencil 1. 步骤 2 观测：书桌 1 上有：闹钟 1，台灯 1，铅笔 1。

Reasoning: [exa_001] Successful co-location! Both objects are present. [exa_002] Pick up target first before 推理：[exa_001] 共位成功！两个目标物体均在场。[exa_002] 在与工具交互前先拾取目标物体。

interacting with the tool. 动作：从书桌 1 拾取铅笔 1

Action: take pencil 1 from desk 1 动作：从书桌 1 拾取铅笔 1

Step 3 Obs: Holding pencil 1. 步骤 3 观测：持有铅笔 1。

Reasoning: [loo_002] Toggle the lamp state to satisfy the "under light" condition. [exa_004] Single toggle rule 推理：[loo_002] 切换台灯状态以满足“在灯光下”的条件。[exa_004] 单次切换规则确保无重复动作。

ensures no repeated actions. 确保无重复动作。

Action: use desklamp 1 动作：使用台灯 1

Result: SUCCESS (Optimal 3 Steps) — Demonstrates superior spatial reasoning and zero-waste navigation. Key Skills: [exa_001] (Object Pairing), [loo_001] (Spatial Priors). 结果：成功（最优 3 步）— 展示了卓越的空间推理能力与零浪费导航。关键技能：[exa_001]（物体配对），[loo_001]（空间先验）。

快速帮助

当前模式

链接样式：—

复制为：—

常用操作

# 图标：复制段落链接 / 片段

收起/展开大纲：O；回到顶部：T

显示/隐藏注释：C

链接样式

  • 原文：#段落（Alt+1）
  • %编码：#%E6%AE%B5%E8%90%BD（Alt+2）
  • 富文本片段（HTML 片段）（Alt+3）
  • 循环切换：U

复制格式（仅“原文 / %编码”可用）

  • 设为 URL：Alt+U
  • 设为 Markdown：Alt+M
  • 二者切换：M

大纲与导航

  • 展开全部：E；收起全部：R
  • 滚动时自动高亮并展开对应大纲分支
